hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const blocked=[/rm\s+-rf\s+\/(?!tmp)/,/DROP\s+DATABASE/i,/chmod\s+-R\s+777/,/curl.*\|\s*(bash|sh)/,/>(\s*)\/etc\//,/mkfs\./,/dd\s+if=/];for(const p of blocked){if(p.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[BLOCKED] Dangerous command: '+cmd+'\n');process.exit(2)}}console.log(d)}catch(e){console.log(d)}})"
hooks.description: Block dangerous bash commands (rm -rf /, DROP DATABASE, chmod 777, curl|bash)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(process.platform!=='win32'&&!process.env.TMUX&&/(npm (run dev|start)|pnpm (dev|start)|yarn (dev|start)|bun (dev|start)|python.*manage\.py runserver)/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[Hook] Consider running dev servers in tmux for session persistence\n');process.stderr.write('[Hook] tmux new -s dev  |  tmux attach -t dev\n')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[Hook] Reminder: review changes before push\n');process.stderr.write('[Hook] Run tests: pnpm test && pnpm lint\n')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"
hooks.description: Remind to review before git push

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const blocked=[/\.env$/,/\.env\.local$/,/\.env\.production$/,/package-lock\.json$/,/pnpm-lock\.yaml$/,/yarn\.lock$/];for(const p of blocked){if(p.test(f)){process.stderr.write('[BLOCKED] Protected file: '+f+'\n');process.exit(2)}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"
hooks.description: Block writing to .env and lock files
Auto-format TypeScript/JavaScript files with Prettier after edit

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const out=execSync('grep -n "console\\.log" '+f,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5000});if(out.trim()){process.stderr.write('[Hook] console.log detected in '+f+':\n'+out+'[Hook] Remove before committing\n')}}catch{}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"
hooks.description: Warn about console.log in production code
Auto-format Python files with ruff after edit

hooks.command:
node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const diff=execSync('git diff --stat',{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5000});if(diff.trim()){process.stderr.write('
[Session Summary] Uncommitted changes:
'+diff+'
')}}catch{}try{const status=execSync('git status --short',{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5000});if(status.trim()){process.stderr.write('[Session] Files: '+status.trim().split('
').length+' modified
')}}catch{}"
hooks.description: Show git changes summary when session ends
